revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Dutch Republic]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Dutch Republic]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Country data Dutch Republic]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Dutch Republic | flag alias = Statenvlag.svg | flag link = Statenvlag | flag alias-1581 = Prinsenvlag.svg | flag alias-prins = Prinsenvlag.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1581 | var2 = prins | redir1 = ZVN | redir2 = United Provinces | redir3 = United Provinces of the Netherlands | redir4 = Republic of the Seven United Provinces | redir5 = Republic of the Seven United Netherlands | related1 = Batavian Republic | related2 = Netherlands </noinclude> }}<noinclude> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Dutch_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
